what: Agent instructions are independent from pipeline prompts — pipeline flow is reference only
why: Agent 有工具能力，能自主决定执行步骤，不需要 pipeline 手把手编排。Agent instruction 描述完整任务目标和参考流程，独立编写；pipeline 的多轮 prompt（Explore/Evaluate/Crystallize、outline/sections/polish）仅用于 Gemini/Mock 模式。两套 prompt 互不依赖，各自演进。
reason: AgnoClient is now a pure adapter with no baked-in instructions. All prompts flow from pipeline via system messages.
